# polymarket_midpoint (Data Source)

Reads the CLOB midpoint price (halfway between best bid and best ask) for an outcome token.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "polymarket_market" "m" { id = "540817" }

data "polymarket_midpoint" "yes" {
  token_id = data.polymarket_market.m.clob_token_ids[0]
}

output "midpoint" { value = data.polymarket_midpoint.yes.midpoint }
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `token_id` (String) CLOB ERC-1155 token ID of the outcome to quote. Obtain it from a market's `clob_token_ids` attribute.

### Read-Only

- `midpoint` (String) Midpoint between the best bid and best ask, in `[0, 1]`, as a decimal string.
